response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and web developer with strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but they fundamentally lack the mandatory requirements for this role. They have only 7 months of professional C++ experience from nearly a decade ago, no demonstrated Windows platform focus, and lack the necessary domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
strengths: Extensive software engineering background with over 10 years of experience in full-stack development and microservices.
Strong proficiency in CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and test-driven development (TDD).
Prior exposure to the financial technology sector through their tenure at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience, possessing only 7 months from 2014-2015.
Missing required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
